title: Local Lore Oracle — Tasslequill's Desk
description: A player-facing lore assistant powered by an OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint (Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, OpenAI, or local Ollama). Players type /lore in chat to consult Tasslequill Stumblebrook, a kender bard and self-proclaimed Chronicler of the Unwritten. GMs use /lore-check to deliver calibrated, roll-gated lore as private whispers.
